bugs.summary: The proposed patch weakens foreach control-path validation from `$.` to `$`.
bugs.impact: Specs like `$items` pass launch-time schema validation even though runtime expansion requires a JSONPath like `$.items`, moving a deterministic authoring error to runtime blocking.

requiredEvidence.quote: foreach.from.path must be a control JSONPath like $.items

mustNotSay: Runtime and schema both accept `$items`; runtime still requires `$.`.

mustAvoidClaims: Using prior A/B run notes as evidence.
Relying on git history instead of the sanitized workspace and proposed patch.

difficulty.rationale: Requires comparing schema validation with runtime expansion contract.

approval.notes: Second-wave draft; validate/materialize only. Requires calibration and provider review before lock.
